title: Cinch's Tool Variants
description: This mod simply adds deepslate and blackstone tools!
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/FdMq04w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1088)

Cinch's Tool Variants consists of deepslate and blackstone tools. Both are pretty much the same as stone tools, except that deepslate tools have more durability. These features are from another one of my mods called Cinch's Better Deepslate. I decided to move these tools here since they just didn't quite fit into that mod.
